changes.content:
# Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-2C

This integration adds the verified historical resource-evidence provider to the existing shared self-knowledge adapter used by both WebUI and Desktop.

Routing remains slash commands first, protected-context self-knowledge second, historical resource evidence third, and ordinary chat last. Current-live questions are not answered from historical evidence.

The WebUI and Desktop application source files remain unchanged. Their integration helpers only receive the new verified adapter hash and optional test-path parameters.

After a verified apply, restart both the FOXAI WebUI backend and FOXAI Desktop before live testing because already-running Python processes may retain the previous helper or adapter module.

No network access, model call, live system scan, process change, service change, startup change, registry write, source-evidence modification, or K: access is performed by this integration mission.

intent: Complete the partially installed, already hash-verified V1B-2C shared resource-provider integration by adding only the three missing support files. Preserve the four already-installed intended integration files without rewriting them. Revalidate the complete seven-file state, shared routing behavior, WebUI/Desktop compatibility, bounded historical evidence, deterministic mission evidence, and all offline safety restrictions.
rollback_boundary: Remove only the three newly added V1B-2C support files and the mission-specific four-file evidence directory Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34_V1B2C_R3_ADD_ONLY_COMPLETION. Do not modify, restore, or remove the already-installed adapter, WebUI helper, Desktop helper, integration verifier, resource provider, WebUI/Desktop entry sources, prior evidence, launchers, runtimes, models, databases, Windows configuration, personal files, or rollback drive K:.
title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-2C R2 — Add-Only Completion of Shared Resource Provider Integration

validations.name: Verify exact seven-file V1B-2C state, unchanged evidence, and normalized three-path add-only snapshot manifest

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,json,subprocess
root=Path("Z:/FOXAI/System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore")
for name in ("self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py","webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py","desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py","shared_resource_provider_integration_verifier_v1.py"):
 data=(root/name).read_bytes(); compile(data.decode("utf-8"),name,"exec")
p=root/"shared_resource_provider_integration_verifier_v1.py"
r=subprocess.run(["Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd="Z:/FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=60)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout)
assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==4
assert obj["resource_category_count"]==18 and obj["source_hash_count"]==18
assert obj["first_non_whitespace_slash_bypass"] is True and obj["protected_context_priority"] is True
assert obj["current_live_pass_through"] is True and obj["ordinary_chat_preserved"] is True
assert obj["canonical_lf_only"] is True and obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
adapter=root/"self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py"
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("v1b2c_adapter_self_test",adapter)
module=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(module)
result=module.self_test()
assert result["status"]=="self_test_ok"
assert result["first_non_whitespace_slash_guard"] is True
assert result["resource_provider_category_count_expected"]==18
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Compile installed integration modules and run isolated verifier and adapter self-tests
Build shared resource-provider integration routing and surface compatibility evidence
Validate exactly four deterministic UTF-8 LF-only integration outputs

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path("Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34_V1B2C_R3_ADD_ONLY_COMPLETION")
receipt=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
declared={row["name"]:row for row in receipt["outputs_before_receipt"]}
assert len(declared)==3
for name,row in declared.items():
 data=(out/name).read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"],name
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"],name
routing=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_RESULTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert routing["status"]=="routing_verified" and routing["all_passed"] is True
assert routing["resource_category_case_count"]==36 and routing["routing_case_count"]==16 and routing["overlap_case_count"]==8
assert len(routing["failure_boundary_results"])==2
assert all(row["passed"] is True for row in routing["resource_category_results"])
assert all(row["passed"] is True for row in routing["routing_results"])
assert all(row["passed"] is True and row["resource_provider_invoked"] is False for row in routing["overlap_results"])
categories={row["category"] for row in routing["resource_category_results"]}; assert len(categories)==18
assert all(row["current_state_claimed"] is False and row["live_scan_performed"] is False for row in routing["resource_category_results"])
slash=[row for row in routing["routing_results"] if row["route"]=="slash_command_bypass"]
assert len(slash)==4
assert all(row["bridge_loads"]==0 and row["registry_verify_calls"]==0 and row["resource_provider_loads"]==0 and row["resource_answer_calls"]==0 for row in slash)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2C_R3_ROUTING_AND_RECEIPT_HASH_RELATIONSHIPS_OK")
validations.name: Validate receipt-declared output hashes, all 18 resource categories, routing order, overlaps, and slash bypass

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path("Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34_V1B2C_R3_ADD_ONLY_COMPLETION")
surface=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_SURFACE_COMPATIBILITY.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert surface["status"]=="surface_compatibility_verified"
assert len(surface["webui_results"])==6 and len(surface["desktop_results"])==5
assert all(row["passed"] is True for row in surface["webui_results"])
assert all(row["passed"] is True for row in surface["desktop_results"])
assert surface["webui_send_envelope_preserved"] is True and surface["webui_stream_envelope_preserved"] is True
assert surface["desktop_display_contract_preserved"] is True and surface["ordinary_chat_route_preserved"] is True
assert surface["slash_command_route_preserved"] is True and surface["live_model_calls_performed"] is False
assert surface["restart_required_after_apply"] is True
routing=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_RESULTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
fail={row["boundary"]:row for row in routing["failure_boundary_results"]}
assert fail["evidence_failure_after_positive_recognition"]["status"]=="evidence_error"
assert fail["evidence_failure_after_positive_recognition"]["model_bypass"] is True
assert fail["evidence_failure_after_positive_recognition"]["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is False
assert fail["provider_unavailable_before_recognition"]["status"]=="pass_through"
assert fail["provider_unavailable_before_recognition"]["model_bypass"] is False
assert fail["provider_unavailable_before_recognition"]["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is True
mapping=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert mapping["status"]=="integrated_and_verified" and mapping["resource_category_count"]==18
assert mapping["generic_webui_launcher_alias"]["result"]=="clarification_required"
assert mapping["generic_webui_launcher_alias"]["resource_provider_invoked"] is False
assert mapping["webui_or_desktop_entry_source_modified"] is False and mapping["restart_required_after_apply"] is True
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2C_R3_SURFACES_FAILURE_BOUNDARIES_AND_ALIAS_OK")
validations.name: Validate WebUI and Desktop compatibility, generic launcher alias, and provider failure boundaries

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path("Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34_V1B2C_R3_ADD_ONLY_COMPLETION")
receipt=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for key in ("first_non_whitespace_slash_bypass_verified","protected_context_priority_verified","resource_provider_integration_verified","current_live_pass_through_verified","ordinary_and_creative_chat_preserved","answer_packet_compatibility_verified","webui_response_compatibility_verified","desktop_response_compatibility_verified","evidence_failure_after_positive_recognition_fails_closed","provider_unavailable_before_recognition_preserves_ordinary_chat","deterministic_utf8_lf_serialization","restart_required_after_apply"):
 assert receipt[key] is True,key
for key in ("live_scan_performed","live_process_inspection_performed","live_listener_inspection_performed","network_connections_initiated","model_calls_performed","automatic_process_changes_performed","services_changed","startup_items_changed","registry_writes","source_evidence_modified","webui_or_desktop_entry_source_modified","rollback_drive_k_accessed"):
 assert receipt[key] is False,key
unchanged={"Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py": "96edd665af8eea2aca3563074f0e894607b03b53c22ac13d36cddc0bd58460f1", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py": "ad501eff2f8162a319085aa4eb6368039e9757e89ee4eaccb11e5f6e446ca6a7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py": "41a1663cd30af8a3800c8082d351f8d0338e75cd1df39d3c801a39cc3075f680", "Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py": "d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952", "Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py": "a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
sources=[["Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE", {"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json": "1688a1a1a90f7925c361996eef6211476d133280307416e5a84e68a3ca07b71f", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_REPORT.md": "6473cc6b7ef328e095348e4ad8813df53e31e061c21f1f5cff6e9993d18c95b7", "CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json": "3dc50e04a634a73c67b963ea3ee10fdb52d1bac126bac26cb22f544f92288fba", "FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json": "8673d496b81aebe432b4f79df7d1b773aea8742f0b09ebfe6d660a9f170f9c3f", "RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json": "40462031e89ea469b7c3940c863d225fa7fbad2cef4c6f44e720154d42cf4c86"}], ["Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER", {"RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_RECEIPT.json": "a660a47f3597531a5e603cddd6069d85c9d68cccec6b59521a489ecf5ed5c3db", "RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_REGISTRY.json": "6e9c3eaea722cb5260f9f0df35d6ea90f37e83697e1b83592670d6599c33e1aa", "RESOURCE_QUERY_FIXTURE_RESULTS.json": "554631166de3da90ad54f737df2b81621fbd55eafef6b553d0fb9f96c6502bd6"}], ["Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-154330-42BAE0_V1B2B_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT", {"RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT_RECEIPT.json": "2738abcb23646e99b9936cd3501721e2901d3cc8ba942cb302d6662ae1dff612", "RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_SEAM_MAP.json": "e43691d671e4feea43c18fc94e97ca82468b2ca9d18d649554c0008bd82ad490", "RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PREFLIGHT_FIXTURES.json": "1dd58fe3d6dd5056e69340f372464d33af38140f9ca076b8cffbb280813c6690"}]]
for source_root,expected in sources:
 root_path=Path(source_root)
 for name,digest in expected.items(): assert hashlib.sha256((root_path/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,(source_root,name)
verifier=Path("Z:/FOXAI/System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/shared_resource_provider_integration_verifier_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8").lower()
for token in ("import socket","import requests","import psutil","import winreg","get-ciminstance","get-nettcpconnection","os.startfile"):
 assert token not in verifier,token
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2C_R3_OFFLINE_SAFETY_AND_SOURCE_PRESERVATION_OK")
validations.name: Validate offline safety, no model or network use, unchanged surface entry sources and evidence, and K exclusion

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path("Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\EngineeringWorkshop\\missions\\ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34_V1B2C_R3_ADD_ONLY_COMPLETION")
names=["SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_MAP.json","SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_RESULTS.json","SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_SURFACE_COMPATIBILITY.json","SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json"]
files=sorted(path.name for path in out.iterdir() if path.is_file())
assert files==sorted(names),(files,names)
total=0
for name in names:
 data=(out/name).read_bytes(); total+=len(data)
 assert b"\r" not in data,name
 obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))
 canonical=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
 assert data==canonical,name
receipt=json.loads((out/"SHARED_RESOURCE_PROVIDER_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt["status"]=="integration_built_and_verified"
assert receipt["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260722-165746-DF7E34"
assert receipt["output_count"]==4 and len(receipt["outputs_before_receipt"])==3
for row in receipt["outputs_before_receipt"]:
 data=(out/row["name"]).read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"] and hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"]
assert total<4*1024*1024,total
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2C_R3_RECEIPT_SERIALIZATION_RELATIONSHIPS_AND_SIZE_OK")
validations.name: Validate receipt relationships, canonical serialization, mission binding, and output ceiling
